AI Sortify

Windows Test Installation

Short guide for installing unsigned test builds from GitHub releases.

Solution

Download the official AI Sortify Windows installer from the GitHub release, keep the file when Edge asks, then use More info and Run anyway in SmartScreen.

Why Windows shows warnings

Microsoft Defender SmartScreen warns because the test installer has an unknown publisher and low reputation. This does not automatically mean the build is malicious, but it means Windows cannot verify the publisher yet.

macOS is already covered by our paid one-year certificate, so this guide is only for the Windows installer.
